title: tillandsia inflata
intro: Tillandsia inflata is a species of epiphytic air plant, commonly known as a bromeliad, that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. Native to Central and South America, this plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia inflata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of allergies, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically harvested, dried, and then used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
